title: Time-of-Day Seasonality Filter
summary: Analyze 60 days of 1-hour OHLCV data (free via yfinance) to calculate the average hourly return for each hour of the trading day per ticker. Block new entries during historically losing hours. Market microstructure creates persistent intraday patterns: the opening 30 minutes are noisy and prone to fakeouts, midday (12-2pm EST) is typically choppy and low-follow-through, while the final hour tends to be directional. Filtering on hourly bias is a free, low-correlation edge.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Execution Quality & Exit Optimization
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
